name: libwps-0.4-4
title: libwps-0.4-4
summary: Works text file format import filter library (shared library)
description:
Works text file format import filter library (shared library)
libwps is a library (for use by word processors, for example) for importing the
Microsoft Works word processor file format. As of November 2006, the project
is new, but it imports Works format versions 2, 3, 4, and 8 with some
formatting. Support for Works formats version 2000 (aka 5) is coming soon.
.
This package contains the shared library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libwps-0.4-4 because Works text file format import filter library (shared library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libwps-0.4-4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libwps-0.4-4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libwps-0.4-4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
